description: This purse references authentic Indian style with its materials but adds new innovative design details, unique to fabindia's design team. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look as you match this to Indian ensembles or wear it over your shoulder with a dress and heels for an Indo-Western fusion.Height: 20 cmWidth: 22 cmSilk upper with matki design detailsFabric shoulder strapMagnetic closureFabric inner with a zippered pocket insideCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
